summary: Project involves a website/app with a testimonials section. The happy clients count needs to be updated from 10,000+ to 500,000+.
known_issues: Testimonials section shows 10,000+ for happy clients count instead of the intended 500,000+

existing_features.title: In the Testimonials page (frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx), update the 'Happy Clients' statistic value from '10,000+' (or any variant like '10000+') to '500,000+'. All other content, layout, styling, and functionality on the page must remain exactly as-is.

projectName: Fix Happy Clients count in Testimonials page to show 500,000+
